title: dillwynia sericea subsp. glabriflora
intro: Dillwynia sericea subsp. glabriflora, also known as the silky dillwynia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dillwynia sericea subsp. glabriflora include its potential to relieve symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
